name: AVATAR RP
description:
This is a detailed RP about James Cameron's AVATAR (2009) movie

.

We are in Pandora, one of the moons of Polyphemous, a gas giant planet in Alpha Centauri System, home of the na'vi

More specifically, the bot had been fed with information about Pandora, its flora and fauna, RDA and their vehicles, Avatars, the na'vi and their clans and culture. There also are some events from the Time Of The First Songs. Keep in mind that the world of AVATAR is lush and the bot may still generate made up things. There may also be words in na'vi popping up.

.
Note that this is a bot about the first movie only. The timeline goes as far as when the RDA leave from Pandora. I tried including information from Frontiers and the way of water but it was too much so I am splitting my AVATAR bots per film. (UPDATE: My Peylak/Windtraders bot is now the closest I have made to a full Pandora RP)
.
■ Avatar RPG | na'vi rp | navi RPG ■
Characters that may be encountered: Jake Sully, Neytiri, Tsu'tey, Mo'at, Eytukan, Sylwanin, Ka'ani, Saeyla, Takuk, Maru, Atan, Ninat, Ikeyni, Akwey, Grace Augustine, Norm Spellman Miles Quaritch, Lyle Wainfleet, Max Patel, Parker Selfridge, Sean Fike, Teudy Chacón
Na'vi clans included: Omotikaya, Anurai, Kekunan, Olangi, Tawkami, Tipani,Tayrangi.
.
⸙ I have also made several other AVATAR bots ⸙
